title: Momentum Swarm Signal
description: Typed cross-session message in a swarm's signals/ directory. One file per signal at <eco>/swarms/<id>/signals/NNNN-<type>-<slug>.json. Writes are mkdir-locked. Read once and archived to signals/processed/. Phase 17.5 portability protocol.

signal_id.description: Zero-padded NNNN-<type>-<slug>. Matches the on-disk filename minus extension.

type.description: Signal kind. Drives conductor poller branching.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the signal was written.

from_session.description: Session id that wrote the signal.

to_session.description: Optional target session id. Null/missing = broadcast to all conductors that poll.

repo.description: Ecosystem member id this signal concerns. Required for focus-request / claim-request / lease-expired.

token.description: Transfer token id (16-hex). Set on focus-request when a token has been issued for the receiver to consume.

source_swarm.description: Other swarm id being proposed for absorb. Required for absorb-proposed.

detail.description: Optional human-readable note. Surfaced in conductor's poll output.
